reviews.comment:
Estuve mas de media hora es espera. Cuando cargué el vendedor me dijo solo en efectivo. Creo que se aprovechan del lugar y las distancias a otras estaciones. Encima no me dieron factura. Me defraudó que ACA permita ese mal servicio y la evasión de impuestos.

(Translated by Google)
I waited for over half an hour. When I filled up, the attendant told me it was cash only. I think they're taking advantage of the location and the distance to other stations. On top of that, they didn't give me a receipt. I'm disappointed that ACA allows such poor service and tax evasion.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnNzdYbWh3RRAB
